top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;
